name: Creamy Chilled Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Soften the gelatin in cold water. Stir over low heat until dissolved.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the softened cream cheese and sugar. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Chill the mixture until it is slightly thickened.
5. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
6. Pour the filling onto the crust.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. Top with strawberry halves before serving.
